creator: root@ai1.alaska.net
text:
Ports contain "files" directories, some containing filenames with "::"
(double-colons) in the name, and these files exist on FAT partitions.
This is a problem for people that have limited diskspace, and would like
to keep ports on other partitions, sometimes FAT partitions (such as
SDHC cards, or others).

Fix: 

Stop creating filenames with colons in them.
How-To-Repeat: Try to copy or create a filename with "::" in the filename to or on a
FAT32 partition.  It will result in an error.  Filenames should be
chosen that are more portable.
